description_long: This object is a simple, upright gravestone or headstone, typically found in cemeteries or graveyards. It features a rounded top and a rectangular base, with the main slab rising vertically from the center of the base. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative elements. The base appears slightly textured, mimicking the look of rough-hewn stone, while the main slab is more polished. The entire structure is monochromatic, resembling carved stone or concrete, and is designed to mark a burial site.
description: A plain, upright gravestone with a rounded top and rectangular base, made to resemble carved stone. The surface is smooth with no visible inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the gravestone with a rounded top and a textured rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the gravestone and the depth of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the gravestone, similar in shape to the front but without any markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the gravestone and the rectangular base.
